error_operation_failed: Operation failed. Please try again later
speaker_headphones_bluetooth_output_disc: If speaker, headphones, or Bluetooth output is disconnected during playback, playback pauses immediately to prevent sound from suddenly playing out loud.

directory_does_not_exist_was_removed: Directory does not exist and was removed from the local library
loudness_leveling_pulls_overall_loudness: Loudness leveling: pulls overall loudness toward the target value, which is useful for matching volume across different audio; threshold: keeps loudness within a range, more like auto gain + suppression.
invert_swaps_left_right_channels_clone: Invert: swaps the left and right channels; Clone: copies one channel to the other side.
sync_failed_try_again_later: Sync failed. Please try again later
enter_new_list_name: Please enter a new list name.
each_slider_corresponds_center_frequency: Each slider corresponds to a center frequency band. Move up to boost and down to cut that band.
directory_will_removed_list_will_no: This directory will be removed from the list and will no longer be scanned.
when_volume_exceeds_value_will_reduced: When volume exceeds this value, it will be reduced automatically so it does not go over the threshold.
online_playback_not_currently_supported_: Online playback is not currently supported for this audio. Please download it first.
directory_already_included_existing_scan: This directory is already included in an existing scan directory

no_login_form_found_no_logged_in: No login form found and no logged-in state detected

title: Title

higher_values_play_faster_affects_tempo: Higher values play faster (affects tempo and duration).
pause_playback_when_another_music_video: Pause playback when another music or video app takes audio focus; normal notification sounds will not trigger it.
release_does_not_include_apk_asset: Release does not include an APK asset
swipe_use_two_fingers_drag_preview: Swipe: use two fingers to drag for preview on the player-page cover and lyrics-page background, and the left-side drawer swipe will be temporarily disabled

used_background_playback_controls_lock_s: Used for background playback controls and the lock screen media panel

when_volume_falls_below_value_will: When the volume falls below this value, it will be automatically boosted close to this threshold.
long_press_drag_then_release_save: Long press and drag, then release to save immediately
farther_distance_softer_slightly_more_at: The farther the distance, the softer and slightly more attenuated the sound becomes.
online_files_do_not_support_content: Online files do not support content preview yet. Please open them with an external app.
access_restricted_risk_control_was_trigg: Access is restricted or risk control was triggered. Please try again later.
simulates_common_spaces_transmission_med: Simulates common spaces or transmission media through band limiting, soundstage narrowing, and delayed reflections. It is recommended to choose a preset first, then fine-tune the intensity.

when_pause_tapped_volume_will_gradually: When Pause is tapped, the volume will gradually fade to 0 over the set duration before actually pausing.

when_off_mini_player_bar_bottom: When off, the mini player bar at the bottom of the app is hidden, and no extra space is reserved for it at the bottom of pages.
